title: Stable spawned worker run ids for operation_id retries
goal: Make swarm operation_id retries keep spawned workers in a stable operation-scoped run_id for reactive list/await follow-up commands.
completionConditions: operation_id-spawned worker run_id helper is implemented and covered by tests
spawn, assign_task spawned workers, and assign_next spawned workers derive a stable operation-scoped run_id unless an explicit run_id is supplied
focused tests, cargo fmt --check, cargo check --lib, selfdev build pass
changes are committed and pushed to feature/embedded-skills-harness
notes: Continuation of issue #13 operation_id/idempotency work. Keep behavior unchanged when operation_id is absent, except using a helper for readability.
